\doxysection{sexp\+\_\+memory.\+h File Reference}
\hypertarget{sexp__memory_8h}{}\label{sexp__memory_8h}\index{sexp\_memory.h@{sexp\_memory.h}}


Wrappers around basic memory allocation/deallocation routines to allow memory usage limiting. Only enabled if {\itshape SEXP\+\_\+\+LIMIT\+\_\+\+MEMORY} is defined when building the library, otherwise the routines are defined to be the standard malloc/calloc/realloc/free functions.  


\doxysubsubsection*{Macros}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
\#define \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__memory_8h_a7bcad4aaee1f4a1e1efbcd6aa016a047}{sexp\+\_\+calloc}}(count,  size)
\item 
\#define \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__memory_8h_ae5ce195066a12a22bcb5c70aaec31b78}{sexp\+\_\+malloc}}(size)
\item 
\#define \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__memory_8h_a34da54ff65fa0cc92534be52422e9b35}{sexp\+\_\+free}}(ptr,  size)
\item 
\#define \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__memory_8h_ab43d6647d17a8f40f037183c676b32f8}{sexp\+\_\+realloc}}(ptr,  size,  oldsize)
\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Wrappers around basic memory allocation/deallocation routines to allow memory usage limiting. Only enabled if {\itshape SEXP\+\_\+\+LIMIT\+\_\+\+MEMORY} is defined when building the library, otherwise the routines are defined to be the standard malloc/calloc/realloc/free functions.
